message:
feat(core): structured ReapReport for orphan reaper scan cycles

Add ReapReport struct (scanned, killed, killed_pids, errors) providing
structured, serializable output from orphan-reaper scan cycles.
Replaces the previous (scanned, killed) tuple return with richer
diagnostic data including specific killed PIDs and per-process errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
